name: netease-mini-player-workspace
description: NeteaseMiniPlayer v3 and v3 Plus workspace.

scripts.format: prettier --write --ignore-unknown README.md docs scripts .github nmpv3 nmpv3-plus package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml eslint.config.js .gitignore .prettierignore
scripts.format:check: prettier --check --ignore-unknown README.md docs scripts .github nmpv3 nmpv3-plus package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml eslint.config.js .gitignore .prettierignore
scripts.validate: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm lint && pnpm format:check
